title: ISMP Modpack
description: The mods used in the ISMP server
body:
## The modpack used in ISMP ##

**THIS MODPACK IS REQUIRED TO JOIN THE SERVER**

**This modpack is mainly focused on Origins however it also features support for voice chat and VR.**

There are some origins present in the SMP that aren't in this modpack, that's because these origins are from More Origins and were ported to a server-sided datapack, this was for 2 reasons. Server member's convenience and MoreOrigins not having a 1.20 version. You can download More Origins [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/moreorigins/files) (CurseForge link)

This modpack contains the following mods
- [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)
- [Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft)

Older versions may include the following:
- [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)
- [Extra Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-origins)

**I will later include the datapacks that were used for use outside the server.**
